expected_effect: Confirm whether the original tri-channel split still reproduces its anti-arb and mean-edge profile on the fresh lane before more structural edits.
expected_failure_signature: If the anchor itself no longer reproduces, the family should be treated as stale and the lane should pivot.
expected_win_condition: Reproduce the prior raw anchor profile closely enough to justify further work on this family.
hidden_coupling_removed: This is a replay control, so it intentionally removes the new synthesis layer and preserves the anchor routing unchanged.
rationale: Replay the strongest raw tri-channel anchor from the prior lane on the new run so the lane can distinguish a bad synthesis from a bad anchor.
title: Inventory tri-channel replay control
why_not_coefficient_retune: This is not a retune; it is a control replay of the prior raw anchor on the fresh lane.
